requirement.title: Make CTO agent triggerable from cloud (GitHub Actions) with cost caps + feature flag
requirement.description: Phase 1 of the always-on cloud architecture. Adds .github/workflows/cto-run.yml (workflow_dispatch only, no cron/issue triggers per grill-me Q2), intake/workflow.ts (env-var intake), policy/cost-tracker.ts ($2/run, $20/day, $50/mo hard kill), CTO_CLOUD_ENABLED feature flag, CLOUD_SETUP.md walkthrough. Builds on top of 61d26be (parallel session's @google/genai migration).

triage.notes: Crosses agent/ and .github/ frozen surfaces. Approval recorded via grill-me session (~17 questions resolving the design tree). User explicit ship-it after final divergence reconciliation.

groups.note: Orchestrator (me) executes directly — sub-agent types architect/developer/qa/sec aren't registered in this remote env; bounded task scope per CTO spec.

orchestrator.summary: 7 files created/modified; npm install + typecheck green; workflow gated by CTO_CLOUD_ENABLED feature flag for instant rollback.

autonomy_check.reason: Frozen surfaces (agent/, .github/) crossed; would normally escalate
